name: Namecheap
description: Namecheap is a domain registrar and DNS hosting provider. Use this API to search and register domains, manage DNS records, configure nameservers, and manage domain renewals and transfers.

capabilities.name: check_domain_availability
capabilities.description: Check if one or more domain names are available for registration.

capabilities.name: register_domain
capabilities.description: Register a new domain name with your Namecheap account.

capabilities.name: manage_dns_records
capabilities.description: Set and retrieve DNS host records for a domain.

capabilities.name: list_domains
capabilities.description: List all domains in your Namecheap account.

capabilities.name: manage_nameservers
capabilities.description: Get and set custom nameservers for a domain.
